key.name: active-provider
key.description: The provider identifier selected for new conversations.

key.name: active-model
key.description: The model identifier selected for new conversations.

key.name: default-image-provider
key.description: The provider identifier used by the image generation tool.

key.name: default-image-model
key.description: The model identifier used by the image generation tool.

key.name: enabled-providers
key.description: Provider identifiers available in chat provider pickers.

key.name: provider-default-models
key.description: JSON object mapping provider identifiers to their default model identifiers.

key.name: provider-discovered-models
key.description: JSON object mapping provider identifiers to discovered model metadata.

key.name: provider-default-image-models
key.description: JSON object mapping provider identifiers to their default image generation model identifiers.

key.name: provider-custom-image-models
key.description: JSON object mapping provider identifiers to custom image generation model metadata.

key.name: provider-discovered-image-models
key.description: JSON object mapping provider identifiers to discovered image generation model metadata.

key.name: send-with-enter
key.description: Whether pressing Enter in the composer sends the message.

key.name: auto-mode-enabled
key.description: Whether tool actions should run without asking for confirmation.

key.name: response-timeout-seconds
key.description: How many seconds to wait before cancelling a provider request.

key.name: provider-fallback-enabled
key.description: Whether failed provider requests should retry with another enabled provider.

key.name: thinking-level
key.description: The reasoning effort to use by default when a provider and model support thinking.

key.name: code-theme
key.description: The GtkSourceView style scheme used for markdown code blocks.

key.name: high-contrast-enabled
key.description: Whether Cusco should increase interface contrast.

key.name: reduced-motion-enabled
key.description: Whether Cusco should avoid nonessential motion.

key.name: computer-use-enabled
key.description: Whether Cusco exposes Linux GNOME computer-use tools to agents.

key.name: computer-use-capture-enabled
key.description: Whether computer use may capture a selected GNOME window.

key.name: computer-use-input-enabled
key.description: Whether computer use may send pointer and keyboard input.

key.name: computer-use-workspace-switching-enabled
key.description: Whether computer use may activate another GNOME workspace.

key.name: computer-use-action-timeout-seconds
key.description: Maximum number of seconds allowed for one computer-use operation.

key.name: custom-openai-compatible-providers
key.description: JSON array containing user-defined OpenAI-compatible provider configurations.

key.name: custom-openai-compatible-base-url
key.description: Legacy base URL migrated into the custom provider list.

key.name: custom-openai-compatible-models
key.description: Legacy model identifiers migrated into the custom provider list.
